entity.summary: Multi-asset trading and payments platform launched under the Uphold brand in 2015 after the 2014 founding of predecessor brand Bitreserve, and still operating across crypto, fiat, metals, and related assets.
entity.notes: The frozen queue name UpHold Exchange is retained, while the official brand styling is Uphold. The service is broader than a conventional order-book exchange. The 2014 Bitreserve predecessor is recorded in the event history.

expected.summary: United States-based centralized exchange launched in 2015 and still operating under the UpHold Exchange brand.

changes.summary: Multi-asset trading and payments platform launched under the Uphold brand in 2015 after the 2014 founding of predecessor brand Bitreserve, and still operating across crypto, fiat, metals, and related assets.
changes.notes: The frozen queue name UpHold Exchange is retained, while the official brand styling is Uphold. The service is broader than a conventional order-book exchange. The 2014 Bitreserve predecessor is recorded in the event history.

events.title: Bitreserve was founded
events.description: The platform lineage began in 2014 under the Bitreserve brand.
events.notes: Year-level marker from Uphold's official history.

events.title: Bitreserve rebranded to Uphold
events.description: Bitreserve adopted the Uphold brand in 2015 and expanded into a broader multi-asset platform.
events.notes: Exact day is not stated, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

evidence.title: Celebrating 10 Years of Uphold
evidence.notes: Official history for the 2014 Bitreserve founding and 2015 rebrand.

evidence.title: About Uphold
evidence.notes: The official page states that Uphold launched in 2015.
